analysis_commentary: Anomalous slow run: 97 training steps (vs ~340 baseline), first probe t=187s. illegal pinned 1.0 throughout, aboveU=0, but max bounded [0.13, 0.33] — insufficient SGD to produce any learning signal either way. Same sporadic slow-start we've seen before; unrelated to draw_penalty. Can't evaluate the change fairly. Regressed on goal metrics.
